title: #else
breadcrumbs: ProcScript: Precompiler Directives and Uniface Constants
text: #else Declares an alternative precompiler condition if none of the previous conditions have been met, and executes the containing ProcScripts and precompiler directives when the condition is met. #if ( Expression_1 ) ... ProcScript statements and precompiler directives { #elseif ( Expression_2 ) ... ProcScript statements and precompiler directives ... ... } { #else ... ProcScript statements and precompiler directives ... } #endif For more details, see #if . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
